A History of Violence (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,493,782Details
International Box Office $29,984,015
Worldwide Box Office $61,477,797
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $39,646,762
Total $39,646,762
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$515,992 (1.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.89 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$32,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:14 opening theaters/1,348 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,750,415

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 23rd, 2005 (Limited) by New Line
September 30th, 2005 (Expands Wide) by New Line
International Releases: March 16th, 2006 (Limited) (New Zealand)
January 12th, 2026 (Limited) (Re-release) (Italy)
February 26th, 2026 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: March 14th, 2006 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong brutal violence, graphic sexuality, nudity, language and some drug use.
Running Time: 96 minutes
Plot point: Surprise Twist
Social setting: Film Noir
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
